{{Quote|She was a tall blue-skinned woman with an elegant headtail that twitched nervously.|Obi-Wan Kenobi's description of Master Vant|<ref name="The Rising Force">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Vant''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as a [[Jedi Master/Legends|docent]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], Vant was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Appointed as an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], Master Vant was made the caretaker of a [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] of [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] and cared for them as they progressed through the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]] from infancy to adolescence.

In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]] one of Master Vant's charges, the young [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], was not selected as an [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]] by a Master, and the [[Council of Reassignment/Legends|Council of Reassignment]] dictated that he was too old to remain at the academy without a master. Going to the [[Jedi Temple dormitory|clan dormitory]], Master Vant delivered the message that Kenobi would have to leave the Temple as he had been reassigned to the [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|Agricultural Corps]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]'' {{1st}}
